story.title: A Damascus-based research and consulting firm
story.body: Strategic Solutions for Research and Consulting (SSRC) is a Damascus-based research and consulting firm dedicated to unlocking knowledge, data, and insights that drive progress and informed decision-making. With extensive experience in public opinion research and analysis, SSRC rigorously measures, analyzes, and interprets social, political, and consumer trends across Syria - with nationwide access from Abukamal to Tartus and Aleppo to As-Suwayda. SSRC's work spans a wide range of sectors vital to national recovery and sustainable growth, including business management, education, tourism, governance, social affairs, and community development.
